name: Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, poor supplier performance causes missed discounts. We provide a procurement analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to effectively measure supplier performance and contract compliance

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to effectively measure supplier performance and contract compliance
